backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the e-commerce backend with product catalog management, per-principal shopping carts, and order placement/status tracking using in-memory Maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the WhatsApp notification feature that opens a pre-filled wa.me deep-link after successful order placement, mapped to frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON file containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, used as build/documentation reference.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Bessie's Ashok Gold' that mounts the React app at #root via the /src/main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, shop, product detail, cart, order confirmation, admin, contact) wrapped in CartProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AdminPasswordGat: Session-based admin authentication gate that renders a password form with show/hide toggle and stores auth state in sessionStorage before rendering its children.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart item row component displaying product image (with ImageOff fallback on error), quantity controls, per-item price in €, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, product category links, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop and mobile nav links, active-route highlighting, and a cart icon with item count badge.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusTrack: Displays a step-by-step order status progress tracker (Pending → Processing → Shipped → Delivered) with a special cancelled state view.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component for a single product showing image, category, name, description, price, stock badge, and an add-to-cart button with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using an authenticated identity when available and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.tsx: React context and hook providing in-memory cart state with add, remove, update-quantity, and clear operations plus derived totals.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout via DFINITY AuthClient, exposing identity, login status flags, and error state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including products (list, get, add, delete, update), cart, and orders (place, get, admin management with status updates).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for a gold/cream luxury theme, and utility classes for gold gradients, card styles, and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page with password-gated access, providing tabs for managing products (add, delete, update price/stock) and viewing/updating all orders with a visual status tracker.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items, handles checkout form validation, syncs cart to the backend, places orders, and sends a WhatsApp notification on success.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page displaying WhatsApp and email contact cards with direct links to initiate communication with the store.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The Home page renders a hero section, trust badges, and a featured products grid using data from the `useListProducts` hook, with skeleton loading states and a fallback image component.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Displays a post-purchase confirmation page showing order ID, total, and an order status tracker fetched by matching the URL param against the user's orders.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Shows a single product's details (image, description, stock status) with quantity controls and add-to-cart/buy-now actions, including loading skeletons and a broken-image fallback.
frontend/src/pages/Shop.tsx: Renders the full product catalog with search, category, price-range, and sort filters applied client-side via `useMemo`, displaying results as product cards or skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts: Provides utilities to build and open a WhatsApp `wa.me` URL pre-filled with a formatted new-order notification message including customer details and itemized totals.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond, Inter), an extended color palette (gold, cream, charcoal, CSS-variable-based tokens), border radii, and plugin registrations for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 29) for the 'Bessie's Ashok Gold' e-commerce site, listing existing features, known issues (images not displaying in Shop), and architectural notes about HTTP image URLs.
